texto: What is this you call property? It cannot be the earth. For the land is our mother, nourishing all her children, beasts, birds, fish, and all men. The woods, the streams, everything on it belongs to everybody and is for the use of all. How can one man say it belongs to him only?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Massasoit que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “What is this you call property? It cannot be the earth. For the land is our mother, nourishing al…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, capitalism, colonization, com foco em colonization e property.
